This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
The first Caecus Command Card played each turn restores HP equal to [Arg3]% of his CON. The Tentacle attack and {Counter} effect of {Bloodline of Heresy} additionally deal [Arg4]% DMG.
